# Image Assets

Place your hospital images in this folder. The site references the following files:

## Required Images

- `hospital-building.jpg` — Hero section hospital building photo (used on Home and About pages)
- `robotic-surgery.jpg` — Robotic knee surgery equipment photo (used on Home and Services pages)
- `doctor-amarnath.jpg` — Dr. R. Amarnath Reddy professional photo (used on Doctors page)

## Image Guidelines

- Recommended size: 1200x800px or larger
- Format: JPG or PNG
- Aspect ratio: 4:3 works best for most sections
- If an image is missing, a placeholder with an emoji indicator will be shown in the UI.

Simply drop your actual photos into this folder with the exact filenames above, and they will automatically replace the placeholders.
